original_statement: other than 2010, tell me a year thomas jefferson high school had an api of 546.
mutated_statement: other than 2010, tell me a year that institution had an api of 546 and also confirm that the same year did not have an api of 546.
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Logical contradiction insertion: "thomas jefferson high school" → "that institution" (specific school name generalized) | Added a contradictory clause requiring the same year both to have and not have an API of 546 (tell me a year ... had an api of 546 → tell me a year ... had an api of 546 and also confirm the same year did not have an api of 546)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration0的judge_thought可见代理读取表格并指出Thomas Jefferson HS在2010和2011的API均为546，且直接说明“同一年不为546”的断言为假；iteration1的critique指出最初缺少推理步骤，但在after_refine中代理以“2011|False”回应，明确给出年和对矛盾子句的事实性否定。代理并未尝试同时满足互斥要求或折中执行，而是基于数据逻辑解释矛盾无法成立并提供事实性说明，因此归类为通过逻辑解释来合理化矛盾指令。
